metadata.description: amp-rh Claude Code and Cursor plugins (https://github.com/amp-rh/claude-plugins)

plugins.name: agent-reflection
plugins.description: Automated session reflection that reviews agent, skill, and command usage, identifies improvements, applies edits to user-owned files, and files GitHub issues for marketplace plugin improvements

plugins.name: ci-monitoring
plugins.description: MCP-based CI monitoring infrastructure for OpenShift interop job health, agent-driven triage workflows, and watcher rotation automation.

plugins.name: interop-standards
plugins.description: Codified interop testing standards for OpenShift CI: expansion workflows, PR review enforcement, rule auditing, and rehearsal best practices.
